title: KQOffice V2 W5 Async Cowork Task Envelope
description: Per-task envelope written by kqoffice::ai::cowork::TaskStore for every async cowork task. JSON-on-disk under ${UserInstallation}/ai-tasks/YYYY-MM/<task_id>.json. Distinct from provider-evidence.schema.json (per-call audit) and apply-plan-runtime.schema.json (per-call apply payload). Locked by W5 spec §'Token lock' (TaskKind 4-token, TaskState 6-token) and W5 spec §'Task Schema' (envelope shape). Out-of-band fields: companion-app pairing tokens / cron schedule live in separate files; this schema only covers the per-task record.

schema_version.description: Envelope schema version. Bumped only when a non-additive change lands. Day-0 ships v1.

task_id.description: Per-day unique task id. Format: tk-YYYYMMDD-NNN (NNN is zero-padded 3-digit counter).

kind.description: Scenario kind. Token lock per W5 spec §'Token lock' (one per scenario at §'4 个前期场景'). Order locked.

state.description: Task state. Token lock per W5 spec §'Token lock' (matches §'状态机' diagram exactly). Order locked. 'awaiting-review' is the standard pre-apply state — never 'needs-review'.

title.description: Human-readable task title shown in TaskManager UI and notifications.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp at task accept (state pending). Seconds precision, 'Z' suffix.

updated_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp at last state-machine transition. Same format as created_at.

service_mode.description: Active ServiceModePolicy mode at task accept. Locked at creation; cron tasks must use the same mode (no silent escalation per W5 spec §'安全').

input.description: Per-kind input payload. Day-0 envelope-only; per-kind input shape lands incrementally.

source_docs.description: file:// or document URL list. Optional for kinds that synthesize from prompt only.

user_prompt.description: Optional free-form prompt to steer task execution.

target_template.description: Output template path or registered template name.

steps.description: Per-step progress. Each step is one Provider call or one local helper invocation. Step state-machine is independent of task state-machine; task state advances only on terminal step rollups.

state.description: Per-step state — narrower than TaskState because steps never enter awaiting-review (the apply-plan that triggers awaiting-review is a task-level rollup).

evidence.description: Provider evidence id minted by the underlying call, when present.

result_plan_id.description: ApplyPlan id assembled from the steps[] outputs once the task reaches awaiting-review. null while running/pending; required to be a string of form ap-<hex16> when state is awaiting-review or applied.

evidence_ids.description: Flat list of provider-evidence ids generated by all steps. Mirrors steps[].evidence when present.

review_decisions.description: Optional. Populated only when state has reached awaiting-review and the user has acted on individual patches. Empty array means user has not acted yet.

failure_reason.description: Optional. Required iff state == 'failed'; free-form short reason string.
